Subject: P1 - INC100029 - Issue with Checkout for Customers.

Impact Description: Starting 12:55 UTC on 29-Jul-25 external customers globally are unable to checkout from the cart page. They're witnessing a 500 internal server error. A total of 400+ calls have been reported as of now.

Latest Update: All the support teams are working on identifying the trigger. Further updates to follow.

Next Update: 13:15 UTC

Regards
Major Incident Management Team.

Subject: P1 - INC100029 - Issue with Checkout for Customers.
